name: Wynn Resorts, Limited
description: Wynn Resorts, Limited is a global leader in the luxury hospitality and gaming industry, renowned for developing and operating iconic integrated resorts. The company’s portfolio includes premier destinations such as Wynn and Encore Las Vegas, Encore Boston Harbor, and luxury properties in Macau, including Wynn Palace and Wynn Macau. Wynn Resorts is celebrated for its commitment to excellence, offering guests world-class accommodations, signature fine dining, high-end retail, and exceptional entertainment. With a focus on personalized service and sophisticated design, the company continues to expand its global footprint with upcoming projects like Wynn Al Marjan Island.
